title: lygodium polymorphum
intro: Lygodium polymorphum, also known as the fern tree or tree fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lygodiaceae and is native to Australia and New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lygodium polymorphum include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lygodium polymorphum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a poultice or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
